name: PT Itama Ranoraya Tbk
summary: PT Itama Ranoraya Tbk distributes medical devices in Indonesia. The company offers Oneject auto disable syringe products, Abbott diagnostics products, Terumo BCT products, Ortho-clinical diagnostics, etc. It is also involved in building and office space rental business. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Itama Ranoraya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Global Dinamika Kencana.
